fields.label: Fieldtype
fields.rationale: Data is the safest default for free-text identifiers or short strings. Select requires `options`; Link requires `options` naming the target DocType; Table / Table MultiSelect require `options` naming the child DocType.

fields.label: Options (for Select / Link / Table)
fields.rationale: Required for Select (newline-separated values), Link (target DocType name), Table / Table MultiSelect (child DocType name). Empty for other fieldtypes.

fields.label: Insert after field
fields.rationale: Without insert_after the field lands at the bottom of the form, which confuses users. Use lookup_doctype on the target DocType first to pick an existing field near a semantic neighbour.

fields.label: Required
fields.rationale: Mark required only when the field is genuinely load-bearing. New required fields on populated DocTypes break existing records and existing flows unless backfilled.

fields.label: Show in list view
fields.rationale: Adding a column to list view is cheap but clutters the UI. Enable only when users will filter or scan by this field.

fields.label: Unique
fields.rationale: Unique constraints fail on existing duplicate records. Enable only on fresh fields or after confirming no duplicates.

fields.label: Read only
fields.rationale: Read-only fields are populated by scripts or hooks, not the user. Enable when the value is derived.
